params._implementation: Address of the OPickAttentionMarket implementation to clone.
params._usdc: USDC token address on Base mainnet.

params._initialReserve: USDC amount to seed each side of the curve. Total cost = 2x this value.
params._keywordA: Primary keyword string (hashed and stored on-chain as bytes32).
params._keywordB: Secondary keyword string (empty for DIRECTION markets).
params._threshold: Threshold value for DIRECTION markets (zero for H2H).

returns.market: Address of the deployed market clone.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

constructor.notice: Deploy the factory with references to the implementation, USDC, oracle, and treasury.

createMarket(uint8,uint8,string,string,u.notice: Create a new attention market as a minimal proxy clone.

setOracleSigner(address).notice: Update the authorized oracle signer address.
